title: Maddam Sir
subTitle: Haseena and Karishma go undercover to bring a cybercriminal to justice. However, the duo is surprised to find that the man is not as easy to capture as they thought.

title: Maddam Sir
subTitle: Ahead of an international cookery competition, two brothers set their sights on the title with a famous recipe for kebabs. However, Mr Bill soon accuses the brothers of stealing his recipe.

subTitle: Shanaya secretly plans to sneak out of the house to party with her friends. Meanwhile, Bapodara quietly prepares his move to take revenge on her.
